keys.description: Master toggle. Off = middleware becomes a no-op. Distinct from the per-tenant attribution_capture entitlement (that's per-tenant; this is global).
How long a session_id cookie lasts. After expiry, a new session_id is minted + AttributionSessionRefreshed fires.
How long a first-touch cookie lasts. Attribution profiles created past this window are treated as new first-touches (rare — most tenants keep it a year+).
Strip query parameters from the referrer URL (keeps path + host). Prevents accidental PII leakage in referrer strings from third-party sites.
Truncate utm_* values longer than this. Malformed URLs with megabyte-length utm_source strings are refused.
Cookie name for Google Ads click ID.
How long the click ID cookie lasts. Matches Google Ads' default.
Ordered precedence for the provider_hint calculation. The first non-null click ID from this list wins.
How often CampaignRollupAggregatorJob runs. Enterprise tenants may go every-15-min for near-realtime dashboards.
Pre-computed rollup windows cached per tenant. Longer windows require more compute; keep this list bounded.
TTL for the top-N campaigns cache. Feeds the tenant dashboard homepage widget.
CampaignRollupAggregatorJob processes this many touchpoints per pass. Larger = fewer DB round-trips + more memory.
Base retention window for attribution_touchpoints rows. Extended to 2555 on Enterprise via attribution_touchpoint_retention_extended entitlement (dynamic at runtime).
Enterprise retention window (7 years). Applied when attribution_touchpoint_retention_extended = true.
Audit hold after reset request before touchpoint hard-delete.
Days with no touchpoint before MarkAttributionChurnedJob transitions lifecycle_state to churned.
Days churned before PurgeArchivedAttributionsJob soft-deletes the profile.
true = first_touch_at is IMMUTABLE and preserved for the life of the profile. false is documented but never used in production — reserved for special-purpose tenants (research, testing).
Which consent category the AttributionMiddleware gate checks. Must exist in the compliance::consent registry.
true = when consent NOT granted, AttributionContext still binds session_id + hashed_ip in-memory (no persistence). false = context is empty; downstream events cannot attribute even ephemerally.
Honor the Sec-GPC HTTP header (Global Privacy Control). When '1', treats the request as consent-withdrawal.
Cadence for AttributionSuppressedByConsentNotification batches. Daily is the sensible default (compliance signal, not operationally urgent).
MergeIdentifiedAttributionsJob looks for anonymous profiles with matching signals in this window before the identify event.
Which signals qualify as a match. session_id is strongest (same browser session pre-signup); ip_hash + device_hash are weaker (multiple users may share IP).
Cap on anonymous profiles absorbed into one identified profile per merge run. Prevents runaway merges from misconfigured proxies.
How to reconcile first_touch when merging. earlier_wins = anonymous's first_touch replaces identified's when older. keep_identified = never overwrite. manual_review = flag for admin decision.
Sampling rate for the 'Attribution Touchpoint Captured' analytics event. 0.1 = 10%. Enterprise may raise to 1.0 for full-fidelity funnel analysis.
Toggle meta-analytics emission for this module. Off = the module fires no analytics events itself (downstream domain events still fire).
Baseline for the count-drift alerts. Any finding above this is a P1 signal (should always be 0).
ReconcileAttributionCountsJob scans this many attributions per pass.
